checks.description: Abstract, Results, Discussion and Conclusions all state the pre-clogging separation mechanism.
The manuscript keeps drive, localized-source and inventory axes distinct.
Pressure evidence is bounded and not used as pressure-calibrated Ib or validation.
Argument map and manuscript no longer contain obsolete 908 checkpoint language.
Voxel fields are described as DEM-derived reconstructions rather than experimental CT.
Claim ledger has no missing-evidence claims and preserves boundaries for central mechanism claims.

boundary: Narrative-coherence audit only; it verifies wording alignment and linked evidence, not new physics.
